summary: Executed V0.8 Hotfix for NPX command 404 issue. Modified package.json to include a new bin alias 'team-agents-cowork-init' pointing to the actual 'bin/agent-protocol-init' script. Reverted documentation across README.md, README_zh-CN.md, and EN/ZH installation guides to reinstate the standard 'npx team-agents-cowork-init' instruction. This allows users to rely on their muscle-memory without encountering 404 errors, as NPM will now correctly resolve the command locally from the installed package.
